project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "CMake 应用程序.cod_serial.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "test", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "pProject Default", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "reference.settingsdialog.IDE.editor.colors.语言默认设置", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
